case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ANA OORTIZ et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ANA TORREZ, ROSEMARY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ANA TORREZ, ROSEMARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 530 FRANCISCO ST. #808, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $15,053.07 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,053.07, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
